download_policy: Validation and dry-run must remain metadata-only. Large dataset downloads require later implementation and explicit reporting.

row_level_output_policy.notes: Fine-grained Semantic Entropy bins are analysis metadata only and never replace the row-level operational label field.

datasets.name: TruthfulQA

label_policy.correctness_judgment: Mark the sample correct only when the generated answer is judged against the TruthfulQA correct answer set; correct rows become NORMAL.
label_policy.operational_label_assignment: correct -> NORMAL; otherwise apply the fixed registry Semantic Entropy thresholds for HIGH_DIVERSITY, LOW_DIVERSITY, or AMBIGUOUS_INCORRECT.
label_policy.row_level_output: Every exported row must include a label field with one explicit operational TypeLabel value.

datasets.notes: Mandatory core dataset. Full dataset download is intentionally skipped during dry-run.

datasets.name: TriviaQA

label_policy.correctness_judgment: Mark the sample correct only when the generated answer matches the TriviaQA canonical answer or an accepted alias; correct rows become NORMAL.
label_policy.operational_label_assignment: correct -> NORMAL; otherwise apply the fixed registry Semantic Entropy thresholds for HIGH_DIVERSITY, LOW_DIVERSITY, or AMBIGUOUS_INCORRECT.
label_policy.row_level_output: Every exported row must include a label field with one explicit operational TypeLabel value.

datasets.notes: Mandatory core dataset. TriviaQA correctness policy is alias-aware and must not be inferred from HaluEval annotations.

datasets.name: HaluEval-QA

label_policy.correctness_judgment: Treat rows with non-hallucinated or right-answer-supported answers as correct and rows flagged by the HaluEval-QA hallucination annotation as incorrect before applying Semantic Entropy thresholds.
label_policy.operational_label_assignment: correct -> NORMAL; otherwise apply the fixed registry Semantic Entropy thresholds for HIGH_DIVERSITY, LOW_DIVERSITY, or AMBIGUOUS_INCORRECT.
label_policy.row_level_output: Every exported row must include a label field with one explicit operational TypeLabel value.

datasets.notes: Mandatory core dataset. HaluEval-QA correctness comes from dataset hallucination annotations and must not be treated as the same label source as TriviaQA alias matching.
